githubMetadata.description: The React Framework for the Web

repoSummary: Next.js is a flexible React framework that gives you building blocks to create fast web applications. It handles routing, rendering, data fetching, and integrations, allowing you to focus on building features.

messages.content: Welcome to **vercel/next.js** 🗺️ workspace! This is a pre-analyzed demo repository. You can explore its files, look at the dependency graph, or select any files in the explorer.
Explain the architecture of this codebase

This repository is structured as a modern **Next.js App Router** project. The entry point resides in `src/app/page.tsx` and `src/app/layout.tsx`. Layouts encapsulate styling and root page trees, while components like `src/components/Sidebar.tsx` and `src/components/MainView.tsx` are imported dynamically or directly into pages to form reusable UI modules.
